codeReview.summary: The fix commit correctly resolves the prior Night and Recovery blocking auth/scoping issues (grant_token resolution, clamped effective date usage in Night, and viewer event_id window checks in Recovery) and does not introduce regressions in those paths. However, the prior Trend blocking issue remains unresolved: trend correlations are still hardcoded to an empty array.

issues.description: Prior blocking concern from trend-view-endpoint review remains unresolved. The endpoint still returns `const correlations: CorrelationResult[] = [];` unconditionally, even when valid `correlations` query pairs are supplied. This still fails VAL-TREND-005 correlation-computation expectations from the mission validation contract.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission shared state still has a scope conflict around correlations: AGENTS says not to implement correlations (P1), while validation contract requires computed trend correlations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md line 14 forbids P1 correlations; validation-contract.md lines 251-254 define VAL-TREND-005 as required correlation computation; current implementation still hardcodes empty correlations at src/app/api/views/trend/route.ts:423-424.

summary: Reviewed fix-view-endpoints-viewer-auth as a re-run against prior Night/Recovery/Trend failures. Night and Recovery blocking issues are addressed, but the Trend prior blocking issue (missing correlation computation) remains unresolved, so this fix review is FAIL.
